rationale: Review 1's finding is exactly correct (the module docstring's 'Main definitions' explicitly enumerates four items but omits the new public `applySubgroupContinuousConstSMul` instance whose addition is the reason for the file) and material; acting on it produces a strictly more accurate/usable docstring. Review 2 approves an incomplete list, so its resulting PR is inferior on the documentation rubric.
